title: Cinder's TaC pbr textures
description: A PBR texture resourcepack of Timeless and Classics Guns,  enhance the immersive experience under shaders.
body:
# Purposes
A PBR texture resourcepack of Timeless and Classics Guns, serves to enhance the texture representation of guns under shaders, allowing guns to correctly display material properties and participate more effectively in shader rendering.
Enhance the immersive experience under shaders.
# PBR Format
LabPBR [https://shaderlabs.org/wiki/LabPBR_Material_Standard](https://shaderlabs.org/wiki/LabPBR_Material_Standard)
# Notice
It is necessary and only possible to display correctly under shaders that support LabPBR.
# Example Display
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ad6bb161588748aff3ccf07a799e10094e70d14.jpeg)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7cc9299b2506dfb0e912d8a3f3cee21da471041.jpeg)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa7f11df7e7bb1a66996ad4c5f44416f06746d48.jpeg)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b6433a6accc2474976ecf94943a3b8fb480465.jpeg)
